hooks.command: f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH:-}"; case "$f" in *.py) [ -f "$f" ] && ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; true

f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH:-}"; case "$f" in */.neuroflow/flowie/*) d="${f%%/.neuroflow/*}/.neuroflow/flowie"; [ -d "$d/.git" ] && { git -C "$d" add -A; git -C "$d" commit -m "sync: auto"; git -C "$d" push; } >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; true
